title: Coinbase (COIN) Analyst Ratings & Price Targets
text: Analyst consensus rating is Buy based on 27 analyst ratings: Strong Buy 52%, Buy 22%, Hold 19%, Sell 4%, Strong Sell 4%. Price target of $300.20 reflecting a 0.00% increase from current stock price as of May 16, 2026. Coinbase Global is well-positioned as the leading cryptocurrency exchange platform in the United States with strong adoption of new products like retail derivatives and prediction markets. The company faces significant headwinds due to recent weakness in the cryptocurrency market and declining trading volumes, with limited upside potential from operating leverage given modest 2026 expense guidance. No specific 2026 earnings forecasts are detailed beyond the price target. The ratings reflect third-party analyst research and are not investment advice from Public.com.
